General.Name: First Shanghai Investments Ltd
General.Description: First Shanghai Investments Limited, an investment holding company, engages in financial services, direct investments, and property and hotel development businesses in Hong Kong, the People's Republic of China, and France. It operates through Financial Services, Property Development, Property Investment and Hotel, and Other businesses segments. The company offers securities investment, securities brokerage, margin financing, corporate finance, underwriting and placements, asset management, and wealth management; and IPO subscription, shares custodian, financial intermediary, and nominee services. It develops and manages residential, service apartment, commercial office, industrial office, hotel, and recreation resort properties. In addition, the company develops and commercializes therapeutic drugs; container transportation and freight forwarding services; and provides financial leasing services, as well as container storage, containerization, and cargo transport. Further, it engages in money lending; provision of agency, management, and secretarial services; dental services; financial consultancy; internet financial service system; futures broking, stock broking, and insurance broking; and operation of hotel and golf course. The company was incorporated in 1964 and is based in Central, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Wing On House, Central, Hong Kong
